text.message: Blue do we have a problem?
Why are we leaving blue unblocked?
nobody is strong on this board
But blue is leading by a lot
12 cards on him pls don’t trade
yea but another 11 and I'll change
So if another 7 rolls you still won’t block them?
You left him unblocked and he went from 3 to 5 while we’re all stuck at 2-3
ojs got the best port tho
Blue got road connect as well
maybe drop a road to stop the connect
Not tryna do anything now we can look back to your game changing block
chill I robbed him w the robber
And then left him completely unblocked for 10 turns
way to drop that road tho
Idk why you’re tryna argue bro
Just admit it he’s winning cause of you
And now you traded him road 😂
all  u had to do was drop a road
yea I woulda helped u drop a road
Ahhh the classic mid game over rob
He’s saying he’s getting overrobbed mid game
You could be at 9 for all I know
While he’s on 8 with an open settle
and u can choose who to rob
Red helping you all game lmao
